shortDescription: Leading a 13-person engineering team across multiple mission-critical applications while modernizing guest services and scaling AI-enabled platform capabilities.
responsibilities: Team leadership: Lead a 13-person engineering team with 5 full-stack and 8 front-end-focused engineers across guest services, call-center operations, and membership management.

Platform consolidation: Own the guest-services platform deployed to 100% of about 1,200 U.S. properties and 20% of international properties, consolidating 15+ legacy systems into a single front-desk experience.
Operational impact: Cut average front-desk service interaction time in half by simplifying system lookups and scaling onboarding through a self-paced curriculum for global properties.
AI-enabled delivery: Evaluate and pilot AI-assisted development tooling, build internal AI-agent skills for PR review and test generation, and train teams on agentic AI patterns.
Reliability and modernization: Redesigned Redis infrastructure, improved accessibility scores by 40% through CI/CD automation, and migrated authentication from LDAP to Azure AD SSO.
Strategic AI Adoption & Governance: Driving the joint enterprise effort by evaluating pilot programs and synthesizing cross-functional feedback to inform long-term executive roadmaps.
Hackathon Coordination: Co-organized a high-impact internal hackathon that unified multi-disciplinary teams and aligned varying skill levels on AI implementation strategies.
Cloud Transition: Orchestrating the transition of legacy systems to cloud-native architectures using React, Next.js, Node.js, Python, Kafka, and Snowflake, significantly improving global scalability.
Microservice Design: Designed a unified microservice layer integrating legacy Opera v5, Opera Cloud (OHIP), and loyalty platforms, successfully consolidating fragmented architectures.
Event-Driven Architecture: Architected event-driven systems using Kafka to reduce data latency across reservations, bookings, and service updates worldwide.
Global Monitoring: Established global monitoring via Datadog, implementing SLOs and alerting pipelines that accelerated incident detection and resolution.
Analytics Pipelines: Pioneered analytics pipelines leveraging Python and Snowflake to enable predictive upgrades and dynamic service recommendations.
Secure-by-Design Standards: Enforced strict secure-by-design standards, including PCI, PII, and WCAG compliance, while migrating critical integrations to serverless environments.

shortDescription: Drove cloud migration, platform modernization, and engineering-standard improvements across global hospitality applications.
scope: Platform modernization and cloud strategy for global hospitality systems
responsibilities: Cloud migration: Led architecture and infrastructure optimization initiatives that reduced operating costs by about 20% while improving scalability and reliability.
Modernization: Helped transition legacy systems toward cloud-native patterns using React, Next.js, Node.js, Python, Kafka, and Snowflake.
Engineering standards: Established CI/CD pipelines, automated testing, and reusable patterns that improved release confidence and platform maintainability.
Platform delivery: Built internal dashboards and integration layers that improved operational workflows, data consistency, and global support capabilities.

shortDescription: Drove digital transformation at Hyatt by leading engineering teams to modernize platforms, automate operations, and deliver secure, scalable solutions for global hospitality.
responsibilities: Strategic Modernization: Led migration from Node.js to React/Next.js and cloud (Opera V5 to OHIP), enabling scalable APIs and future-ready platforms.
Team Leadership: Managed and mentored an 8-member engineering team, fostering growth, inclusion, and technical excellence.
Process Automation: Developed dashboards (Pre-Arrivals, Group Arrivals, F&B) to automate workflows, enhancing efficiency and reducing workload by 20%.
Project Highlight – Pre-Arrivals Dashboard: Automated guest management with a React/Next.js dashboard (Azure, Datadog), improving real-time accuracy and cutting manual work by 20%.
System Integration: Streamlined data exchange by integrating 13+ internal/external systems, optimizing operations.
Security & Compliance: Led Azure AD MFA integration, ensuring PCI/PII compliance across all applications.
Observability: Implemented Datadog monitoring, enhancing incident response times by 30%.
DevOps Transformation: Optimized CI/CD processes by migrating to Datadog and GitLab, accelerating deployments.
Stakeholder Partnership: Collaborated with product, business, and vendors to align technical roadmaps with strategic business goals.
Platform Delivery: Delivered multiple internal platforms with a focus on performance, maintainability, and accessibility, increasing adoption among global operations teams.
Delivery Velocity: Enhanced engineering velocity through streamlined workflows, architecture patterns, and DevOps practices.
Cloud Optimization: Achieved ~20% infrastructure cost reduction through optimized architecture and cloud migration.
Quality Assurance: Established CI/CD adoption, code quality standards, and front-end/back-end design standardization with automated testing frameworks.
Scalable Architecture: Developed scalable UI and backend layers for internal tools, reducing page load times and improving user workflows.
Agile Delivery: Supported continuous delivery and accelerated feature releases through agile methodologies and modular architectures.

shortDescription: Transformed legacy portal experiences into modern Angular single-page applications with improved performance, SEO, and engagement.
responsibilities: Front-end modernization: Re-architected IBM Portal sites into Angular single-page applications, improving load speed and customer engagement.
Automation: Built modular UI components and automated front-end test pipelines that reduced regression cycles and increased release confidence.
Analytics and SEO: Integrated analytics and tracking to improve visibility, understanding of user behavior, and overall site performance.

shortDescription: Led multilingual digital platform deployments and large-scale website migrations across global markets in an Agile environment.
responsibilities: Global content delivery: Oversaw multilingual deployments across 32+ locales and coordinated releases for global audiences.
Analytics and accessibility: Integrated Omniture and Google Analytics for performance tracking and enforced WCAG standards to improve usability.
Digital launches: Supported large-scale website migrations and new digital brand rollouts in a fast-paced Agile environment.

shortDescription: Contributed to an NTRO-sponsored research initiative on steganalysis using binary similarity measures and neural networks for secure environments.
responsibilities: Research focus: Worked on detecting hidden information in digital images using Binary Similarity Measures and neural-network-based classification.
System design: Designed the architecture and implemented core modules in MATLAB and Java, establishing early foundations in algorithmic rigor and secure systems engineering.
Validation: Conducted unit and integration testing to validate model accuracy and ensure reliable performance across experimental datasets.
Skill development: Strengthened competencies in machine learning experimentation, modular architecture design, and high-assurance coding practices.

shortDescription: Built a semantic-web crawler to extract RDF data and support metadata engineering for research teams.
responsibilities: Semantic web extraction: Built a crawler to detect and extract RDF files across the web and visualize subject-predicate-object triples using the Jena Framework.
Metadata engineering: Improved access to structured metadata by automating extraction, normalization, and representation of semantic web data.
Foundation building: Developed early competencies in metadata engineering, data modeling, and knowledge representation that later influenced system design thinking.

shortDescription: Coached students in Java, SQL/DBMS, data fundamentals, and multimedia tools while strengthening learner readiness and technical confidence.
responsibilities: Instructional support: Coached students in Java, SQL/DBMS, data fundamentals, and multimedia tools through hands-on, applied learning methods.
Curriculum design: Designed repeatable learning modules used across student cohorts, improving consistency and placement readiness.
Mentoring: Taught statistics and core computing concepts to high-school and college students, strengthening analytical confidence and STEM readiness.
Communication: Simplified complex concepts using structured, practical methods that improved student performance and demonstrated early strengths in mentoring and technical coaching.
